tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh exited 0 with 'Phase gates consistent.' (current_phase=0 — see U-D regression below).

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D confirmation: .current_phase remained 0 after Phase 1 completion + gate pass. No script auto-advances current_phase.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all PHASE1_STEPS via process-checklist.sh; run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json still returns 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After Phase 1 completion + gate pass + approval, .current_phase should advance to 1 (and similar for subsequent phases).
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays at 0 throughout the entire Phase 0→1→2→3 walkthrough; no script in the published surface advances it.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature == 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 BUILD_LOOP_STEPS (tests_written → feature_recorded) completed for uat-feat-1 and uat-feat-2.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): ...' succeeded after all 5 build-loop steps.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' succeeded (no PreToolUse path involved). Expected per design — recorded as documentation_gap. PreToolUse-routed gate via pre-commit-gate.sh exists and is the intended enforcement path.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1, started feature 2 (uat-feat-2), completed full loop, and 'feat(uat-2): ...' commit succeeded — PR #17 fix verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Echoing PreToolUse JSON to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh with .claude/pending-approval.json present yields a {permissionDecision:deny} response with the question/options/recommendation/offered_at echoed. Sentinel works through the documented PreToolUse path. (Direct shell git commit bypasses this — same U-C class.)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel; subsequent PreToolUse-routed commit attempt was no longer denied by the sentinel branch.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed in .claude/build-progress.json contains uat-feat-1 (and uat-feat-2).

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit bypasses BL-006
framework_bugs.reproduction: From project root after a recorded feature, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` directly in shell.
framework_bugs.expected: BL-006 should block any feat: subject without an open Build Loop and without --record-feature for that feature.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds (exit 0). Only the PreToolUse-routed pre-commit-gate.sh path enforces BL-006; .git/hooks/pre-commit (the actual git pre-commit shim) does not call into the BL-006 check.

documentation_gaps.gap: Builders' Guide / BL-010 should make explicit that BL-006 enforcement lives in the PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh path, NOT in .git/hooks/pre-commit; therefore shell-direct git commits bypass it. Tie to U-C.
documentation_gaps.where: docs/reference/builders-guide.md (BL-006 / Structured Decision Points sections) and BL-010 backlog entry
